def positive_type_branch_and_mode_branch_compounded_in_same_function():
    rule_id = "type_branch_and_mode_branch_compounded_in_same_function"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag functions that branch on both runtime type and mode string in the same decision tree."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
